name: Kanani Industries Limited
summary: Kanani Industries Limited engages in the manufacture and retail of diamond studded jewelry in India. The company offers its jewelry to wholesalers, jewelry manufacturers, traders, and retailers. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as IMP Finance Limited and changed its name to Kanani Industries Limited in October 2007. Kanani Industries Limited was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Mumbai, India.
